heading: Applicability of administrative provisions of subchapter I
label: 1642o Applicability of administrative provisions of subchapter I
text: To the extent they are not inconsistent with the provisions of this subchapter, the following provisions of subchapter I shall be applicable to this subchapter: Subsections (b), (c), (d), (e), (h), and (j) of ; subsections (c), (d), (e), and (f) of .section 1623 of this titlesection 1626 of this title
